name: web-fetch
description: Fetch the content of any URL and return it as readable text. HTML tags are stripped for clarity.
author: OrionOmega

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return its text content. HTML tags are stripped for readability.

maxChars.description: Maximum characters to return. Defaults to 10000.

extractMode.description: Extraction mode: 'text' (default) or 'raw' for unstripped content
